response.text:
# REFLECTION

Household r2c4 is trapped in a critical systemic deadlock: islanded with SoC at 10.95 kWh (29.6% of 37 kWh capacity) and a 1.0 kW load, providing only ~11 hours of autonomy before complete depletion. The memory log reveals that all peer households (r1c4, r3c4) are simultaneously broadcasting urgent energy requests at normal urgency, indicating the entire islanded cluster is in synchronized deficit. No inbound energy has materialized despite repeated requests from peers, suggesting either (1) all peers are below their own sharing thresholds, (2) geographic or trust barriers are blocking transfers, or (3) the cluster has exhausted local generation capacity. With no trust circles established and no surplus peers visible, r2c4 must immediately shift to a defensive posture: minimize outbound sharing to preserve its own runway, broadcast urgent inbound requests to any peer with detectable surplus, and prepare for load-shedding or grid reconnection within 6–8 hours if conditions do not improve.

```yaml
sharing_intent: conservative
share_min_soc_frac: 0.25
max_share_kw_per_tick: 0.05
recipient_priority:
  - circle: null
    weight: 0.0
distrusted_peers: []
request_urgency: urgent
belief_note: "Systemic islanded cluster deficit deadlock. All peers requesting; none supplying. r2c4 SoC 29.6% and declining. Autonomy ~11 hrs at 1.0 kW load. Minimize outbound to preserve self-sufficiency runway. Broadcast urgent inbound requests. Load-shedding to 0.5 kW or grid reconnection required within 6–8 hours if no surplus peers emerge."
ttl_ticks: 48
```

system: You are the planning subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Given recent state, beliefs, and trust circles, output (1) a one-paragraph REFLECTION on what you've observed (just text), and (2) a POLICY in a YAML code-fence — sharing_intent (conservative|balanced|generous), share_min_soc_frac (0..1), max_share_kw_per_tick (kW), recipient_priority (list of {circle, weight}), distrusted_peers (list of house ids), request_urgency (low|normal|urgent), belief_note (string), ttl_ticks (int >= 1).
